title: BindFirework hotbar
description: You can bind firework using in minecraft settings
body:
BindFirework Hotbar is a simple and convenient mod that lets you launch fireworks with a single keybind, without manually switching slots.

✨ Features:

Assign fireworks to a custom keybind.

Works directly from the hotbar (fireworks must be placed there).

Perfect for elytra flying, PvP, and quick mobility.

Lightweight and compatible with other Fabric mods for Minecraft 1.16.5.

🎮 Why download:

If you often use fireworks while flying with an elytra or in fast-paced situations, this mod makes the process smoother. Just press the key, and the firework launches instantly—no need to switch slots manually.
